finding: The lifecycle scripts move OUT of ziee into agent-kit UNCHANGED. The committed symlink blob SHA (1299ed0c) is byte-identical to the reference branch's, and every script resolves through the symlink: lifecycle-check.mjs / merge-gate.mjs / preflight.sh / selftest{,-hardening,-lib}.sh all `test -e` OK. `merge-gate.mjs --verify-head --rev HEAD` exits 0 (the extraction's own merge-gate depends on this). Ziee's lifecycle behaviour is preserved — it now reads the maintained shared copy.

All 7 skill symlinks + the lifecycle symlink + scripts/install-agent-hooks.sh symlink are committed as mode 120000 (true git symlinks, not text files), and every target exists in agent-kit @ e2e805b. `head -1 .claude/skills/feature-lifecycle/SKILL.md` reads the file through the symlink. No dangling link.

dev-init step 3 installs a pre-push hook into the SHARED git-common-dir (worktrees share .git/hooks). Audited: the hook is guarded — it exits 0 (pass-through) for any push that is not to main and whose worktree has no .lifecycle/ dir, so other worktrees' normal pushes are unaffected. It overwrote only pre-push.sample (no prior custom hook clobbered). No push is performed in this task. Side effect declared in TRANSFORMS D-4 + BOUNDARY.

agent-kit gitlink is staged at 160000 e2e805bd29433051509c5a6e4984fbd13b7e767d — exactly the pin c663ef8ea (the reference final) records. The pre-existing sdk (1a9d3758) and src-app/server/vendor/pgvector (cab9da72) submodules are UNTOUCHED (gitlinks + .gitmodules stanzas unchanged). Verified via `git ls-files -s`.

dev-init.sh ran twice more after staging; `git status --short` is byte-identical before/after (diff empty). Step 0 now sees `.claude/lifecycle` as a symlink and skips the Windows self-heal; link() leaves a correct committed symlink as-is; the hook re-install is byte-identical. Safe to re-run after any clone or stale link.

The whitelist entries lost their trailing slash (!.claude/lifecycle not !.claude/lifecycle/) + gained !.claude/app.config. A trailing-slash pattern matches dirs only, and a symlink is a file — without this the new symlinks would be silently IGNORED. Confirmed the symlinks + app.config actually stage (git add -A shows A/T entries, not ignored). Matches the reference .gitignore diff.

The @import (@agent-kit/docs/FRAMEWORK.md) + all 7 repointed framework-doc links resolve to real files: FRAMEWORK/META_FRAMEWORK_ARCHITECTURE/REACT_COMPONENT_PATTERNS/PERMISSION_GATING/BACKEND_ARCHITECTURE/TESTING_GUIDE/DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE/FRONTEND_DEPS .md all exist under agent-kit/docs/. On the sdk-extraction base these ./.claude/*.md links were ALREADY dangling (docs never in-tree here) — the repoint fixes them. Zero remaining ./.claude/[A-Z]*.md refs; DESIGN_SYSTEM.md kept at repo root.

The staged set is purely .claude/* + .gitmodules + .gitignore + CLAUDE.md + justfile + scripts/{dev-init.sh,install-agent-hooks.sh} + the agent-kit gitlink. ZERO .rs / migration .sql / Cargo.* / package.json / openapi.json / api-client/types.ts change — no crate/openapi/types golden to re-run.

The skill-link set is enumerated from `agent-kit/skills/*/` (with the nullglob guard `[ -d "$d" ] || continue` so an empty submodule never yields a bogus `.claude/skills/*` link), NOT a hardcoded list — so a skill added/removed in agent-kit re-syncs on the next dev-init without editing ziee. The final hardening (nullglob guard) from reference tip c663ef8ea is present.

The consumption files were taken from the FINAL reference state (tip c663ef8ea / e2e805b pin), not intermediate commits. app.config is byte-identical to the reference; the justfile dev-init recipe block is byte-identical (tail -9 diff empty); dev-init.sh is the hardened nullglob-guarded form.
